positive: A detailed, dark cyberpunk cityscape viewed through a rainy window. Neon signs reflecting on wet pavement, flying drones, and holographic advertisements. High contrast, synthwave aesthetic, deep blues, magenta, and electric cyan. Cinematic illustration, concept art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, soft lighting, pastel colors
